title: Flutter: message timestamps and sender names
description: MessageBubble does not display timestamps or sender names. Add: (1) sent-at time under each bubble (HH:mm format), (2) display name above each bubble (derive from relay directory, fall back to first 8 hex chars of pub_id). The ChatMessage class in relay_service.dart already has 'sender' field; add 'timestamp' field (DateTime.now() on receive).
